mapper.select: SELECT REP_NO, REPORTER_NO, (SELECT DISTINCT NICKNAME FROM REPORT LEFT JOIN MEMBER ON REPORTER_NO = MEMBER.NO WHERE REPORT.REPORTER_NO = MEMBER.NO) AS REPORTER, REPORTED_NO, (SELECT DISTINCT NICKNAME FROM REPORT LEFT JOIN MEMBER ON REPORTED_NO = NO) AS REPORTED, REASON, TO_CHAR(REP_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REP_DATE, REP_STATUS, REP_CONTENT FROM REPORT LEFT JOIN MEMBER ON REPORTER_NO = MEMBER.NO ORDER BY REP_NO DESC
